0xadc9772e.name: stake
0xadc9772e.reason: user safety-module stake: deposit AAVE, mint stkAAVE shares to `to`. Maps to staking::Stake (venue=aave_safety_module).

0xecd9ba82.name: stakeWithPermit
0xecd9ba82.reason: user safety-module stake with bundled EIP-2612 permit; shares to msg.sender. Maps to staking::Stake (recipient omitted ⇒ submitter).

0x787a08a6.name: cooldown
0x787a08a6.reason: user safety-module action: start the unstake cooldown window. Maps to staking::Cooldown.

0x1e9a6950.name: redeem
0x1e9a6950.reason: user safety-module redeem: burn stkAAVE, withdraw AAVE to `to` (post-cooldown). Maps to staking::Redeem.

0x9a99b4f0.name: claimRewards
0x9a99b4f0.reason: user safety-module claim: withdraw accrued AAVE rewards to `to`. Maps to staking::ClaimRewards (reused; venue=aave_safety_module, reward_token=AAVE).

0x5c19a95c.name: delegate
0x5c19a95c.reason: governance power-delegation primitive on stkAAVE (stkAAVE carries voting+proposition power). ScopeBall core permission-delegation red-flag; reuses airdrop::Delegate. Same surface as AAVE/aAAVE.

0xdc937e1c.name: delegateByType
0xdc937e1c.reason: governance power-delegation primitive on stkAAVE; one power type (0=voting,1=proposition). Reuses airdrop::Delegate value-map. Same surface as AAVE/aAAVE.

0xeab52318.name: claimRewardsAndRedeem
0xeab52318.reason: deferred compounding wrapper: claim AAVE rewards + redeem stkAAVE in one call. Base claimRewards + redeem covered; share measured P2, follow-up if dominant.

0x955e18af.name: claimRewardsAndStake
0x955e18af.reason: SCOPE ORACLE: 14.7% of recent stkAAVE txs (dominant compounding action) — covered via staking::Stake (stakes `amount` of just-claimed AAVE rewards, shares to `to`). stkGHO has no equivalent (AAVE rewards can't restake into a GHO module).

0x9c9b5154.name: claimRewardsAndRedeemOnBehalf
0x9c9b5154.reason: operator-gated: msg.sender must be the registered claim helper for `from`. Not a direct user pre-sign.

0xa095ac19.name: metaDelegate
0xa095ac19.reason: relayer-submit: on-chain consumer of an off-chain EIP-712 Delegate signature (v,r,s). Signer risk captured at off-chain sign. Mirrors AAVE metaDelegate EXCLUDE.

0x657f0cde.name: metaDelegateByType
0x657f0cde.reason: relayer-submit: on-chain consumer of an off-chain EIP-712 DelegateByType signature. Mirrors AAVE metaDelegateByType EXCLUDE.

0xd505accf.name: permit
0xd505accf.reason: standard EIP-2612 permit; erc20 standard adapter / relayer-submit of off-chain Permit sig.

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: standard ERC-20; erc20 standard adapter auto-enumerates via tokens:erc20.

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer
0xa9059cbb.reason: standard ERC-20; erc20 standard adapter auto-enumerates via tokens:erc20.

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: standard ERC-20; erc20 standard adapter auto-enumerates via tokens:erc20.

0x39509351.name: increaseAllowance
0x39509351.reason: standard ERC-20; erc20 standard adapter auto-enumerates via tokens:erc20.

0xa457c2d7.name: decreaseAllowance
0xa457c2d7.reason: standard ERC-20; erc20 standard adapter auto-enumerates via tokens:erc20.

0x45755dd6.name: returnFunds
0x45755dd6.reason: admin: return funds to the module post-slash.
